title: Smoke: primary route renders without console errors
description: Load /capas as authenticated users with representative roles.
expectedOutcome: Page renders; critical widgets visible; no unhandled promise rejections in console for happy path.

title: API contract tests for changed endpoints
description: Exercise new/changed Express routes with auth headers; assert status codes, error shapes, and side effects on audit logs.
expectedOutcome: Responses match documented contracts; failures are structured; no silent 500s for valid input.
